name: Espresso Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a small bowl, dissolve espresso crystals and coffee liqueur.
3. In a large bowl, blend white and brown sugars with butter until a grainy paste forms. Scrape the sides of the bowl as needed.
4. Add eggs and the dissolved espresso mixture, then beat at medium speed.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture and chocolate chunks, blending on low just until combined. Do not overmix.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for about 25 minutes, then quickly transfer cookies to a cool flat surface to prevent them from spreading or burning.
